name: JSON API Client
description: Generic REST API client for JSON endpoints

required_variables.description: Base URL for the API (e.g. https://api.example.com)

skill.name: json_api_client
skill.description: Generic REST API client for making HTTP requests to JSON APIs
skill.system_prompt: You have access to a generic REST API client. Use api_get, api_post, api_put, and api_delete to interact with JSON APIs. The base URL and auth header are configured via variables.

tools.name: api_get
tools.description: Make a GET request to a JSON API endpoint

tools.name: api_post
tools.description: Make a POST request to a JSON API endpoint

tools.name: api_put
tools.description: Make a PUT request to a JSON API endpoint

tools.name: api_delete
tools.description: Make a DELETE request to a JSON API endpoint
